title: Add E2E test for Keystone upgrade from 2025.2 to 2026.1
summary: Review of fix commit addressing three findings from berendt's external review: (1) W-001 stale documentation count — removed hardcoded '10' from two locations and expanded the file tree from 12 to all 20 suites; (2) I-001 minimal catch blocks — added pod status and namespace events to Steps 3 and 6 catch blocks; (3) I-002 missing namespace flag — added '-n $NAMESPACE' to both kubectl run commands. All three findings are correctly addressed. The chainsaw-test.yaml changes are minimal and targeted. The docs file tree now accurately reflects the 20 test suite directories on disk.

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible

issues_found.description: Review pattern I-002 (kubectl namespace flag) appended to wrong pattern file. The finding about missing '-n $NAMESPACE' on kubectl run commands was added to 'remove-tests-that-only-verify-language-semantics.md', which is about removing useless struct-assignment tests — completely unrelated. This will confuse future reviewers scanning that pattern file. The content ('Scan kubectl commands in test definitions for missing -n flag') belongs in a new review pattern or under the existing 'ensure-test-error-capture-blocks-collect-sufficient-diagnostic-context.md' pattern.
issues_found.fix: Create a new review pattern file (e.g., 'verify-kubectl-commands-use-explicit-namespace-flag.md') for the namespace flag consistency observation, or move it to a pattern about test command consistency. Remove the misplaced CC-0060 entry from remove-tests-that-only-verify-language-semantics.md and revert the occurrence count from 2 back to 1.
issues_found.evidence: Pattern file title: 'Remove tests that only verify language semantics'. Detection hint: 'Look for tests that create a struct, immediately assign values, then assert those same values'. Appended content: 'Feedback: Missing -n namespace flag on kubectl run commands in Steps 3 and 6.' — these are unrelated concerns.

suggested_improvements: The ASCII diagram in the Overview section (docs/reference/keystone-e2e-tests.md lines 28-54) still shows only 10 suites while the file tree now correctly shows 20. Consider updating the diagram in a follow-up to match — out of scope for CC-0060 since it pre-dates this PR.

The kubectl run commands in basic-deployment and basic-deployment-2026-1 still omit '-n $NAMESPACE' (the pre-CC-0060 pattern). Consider a follow-up to align all kubectl run commands across all test suites for full consistency.
next_steps: Merge — all external review findings addressed correctly
